title: My Body Has Time. So Do I.
subtitle: An affirmation for releasing the urgency to change your body fast
excerpt: An affirmation for when the pressure to change quickly is louder than any other thought. Use it to name a different tempo: one body, enough time, no deadline imposed from the outside.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 8 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation for releasing the external timeline on your body. Use it when the "now or never" voice has been running all morning and you need to set it down.
The pressure to change the body quickly often lands as a deadline nobody set on paper but feels entirely real. This affirmation names a different tempo.
My body has time. So do I.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on your belly. Say it again any time the urgency comes back in during the day. The pace you move at is yours to set.
Adapted from Day 8 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
